## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:` …)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes (zero warnings)
- [ ] `pnpm check-types` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Scope is focused (one logical change)
